query: Find 10 parcels in Drammen municipality larger than 5000 m² that intersect 200-year flood zones, sorted by distance to the nearest quick-clay hazard zone ascending.

1.description: get Drammen municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get 200-year flood polygons (gjentaksintervall=200) reduced by attribute

3.description: get parcels in Drammen with area > 5000 m²

4.description: reduce flood polygons to the municipality extent

5.description: find parcels that intersect reduced 200-year flood polygons

6.description: deduplicate parcels to one row per teigid keeping geometry

7.description: get quick-clay hazard polygons (kvikkleire) national layer

8.description: reduce quick-clay polygons to the municipality extent

9.description: compute distance from each flooded parcel to nearest quick-clay polygon

10.description: sort parcels by distance ascending and limit to 10
